name: Watchtower Third Floor
description: The topmost floor of the watchtower, open to the elements through wide arrow slits. You have a commanding view of the surrounding lands: a dense forest spreads to the east, a small village lies to the southwest, a murky swamp festers to the south, and to the north the castle looms across many moats and layers of walls.{{shortbow_desc}}
ambient: The wind whistles through the arrow slits.
You can see smoke rising from the village to the southwest.
A bird of prey circles high above the forest.

objects.name: shortbow
objects.description: A well‑strung shortbow leaning against the arrow slit.

on_interact.look: A well‑strung shortbow. The limbs still have some spring.

description_snippets.shortbow_desc: A shortbow lies upon a parapet.

interaction_rules.text: You lean out an arrow slit. The forest is a dark green sea; the swamp glimmers with stagnant pools.
Your whistle is snatched away by the wind. The circling hawk doesn't react.
The stone is warm from the sun. You can feel the vibrations of the tower shifting slightly in the wind.
